column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for parts of Sarasota, Manatee until Aug 04 10:00PM. Download the ABC Action News App for the latest weather information.

it’s been nonstop warnings , so many
So many!
sooo many! And so much rain!!

oh gosh Lindsey! Prayers for all your animals!
obsessively watching them
oh no
it’s crazy!
